meaning: n.拱门,弓形结构,拱形v.(使)弯成弓形adj.主要
examples: He went under a brick arch.
Marble Arch is a famous London landmark.
The arch once stood alone at the entrance to the castle.
For a more adventurous meal, venture to Moyo in the Melrose Arch neighbourhood.
The magnificent caves are part of the Marble Arch Caves Global Geopark in County Fermanagh.
